title: Goku Custom Menu
description: Son Goku themed custom Minecraft menu. Made By Berkay3435TR.✨
body:
- This resource pack customizes the Minecraft main menu, adding a unique Son Goku theme. It replaces the default Minecraft Java Edition title with a custom design ✨, updates the background and menu buttons , and changes the appearance of the settings interface for a brighter look.

-In-game appearance
